_meta.approach: Source has 23,750+ entities and 364k lines. Element-level golden is impractical and not informative. Instead this golden specifies expected aggregate statistics, structural patterns, and spot-check anchors. Algorithm correctness is judged by these aggregates plus the small_floorplan golden (which is element-precise).
notes: Building name (from ANNOTATION layer): 'SYNTHETIC MULTIFAMILY FLOOR PLAN'.
Overall dimensions: 114000 mm × 98200 mm based on largest dimension texts.
Building has 19×19 grid (X axes labeled A-S, Y axes labeled 1-19).
Door convention same as small DXF: each door = 1 LINE + 1 ARC; uniform 800mm width.
Window convention same as small DXF: parallel pair with 80mm depth offset.

TEXT._note_: ~110 'UNIT N' labels + 5-6 special labels (ELEV 1, ELEV 2, MAIN CORRIDOR, STAIR x2) + ~210 room labels (LIVING/BED/BATH/KITCHEN per unit)

GRID._note_: 19 vertical + 19 horizontal grid lines = 38 LINE. CIRCLEs = grid bubble symbols. Labels 1-19 + A-S = 38 TEXT (one duplicate or empty, hence 37)

FURNITURE._note_: Furniture is non-architectural — preserved as raw, not promoted to semantic.

HATCH_SIM._note_: HATCH simulation via LINE — this is an Asian-style or simulated hatch convention. Algorithm should preserve as raw, not extract as wall.

expected_unit_labels.format: UNIT N where N is integer

structural_invariants_to_verify: Each unit has exactly one entry door (door arc on a wall facing MAIN CORRIDOR).
Doors: total ~1296. If algorithm extracts ~1200-1400 it's within tolerance.
Windows: total ~972. Each window is on an exterior wall.
Walls: parallel-line-pair extraction yields ~250±50 walls (exterior + interior of all units).
Room detection on walls graph yields one face per unit (~110) + corridor + 2 elevators + ≥1 stair + small spaces (closets, etc.) = ~400-600 rooms total.
Total floor area should be close to 114m × 98m = 11,172 m² minus walls and outdoor areas. Typical building net area ~75-85% gross.
noise_handling_expected: FURNITURE layer entities: 7776 total (LINE + CIRCLE). All preserved as raw, none promoted to walls/openings/rooms.
HATCH_SIM layer: 3888 LINE entities simulating hatch fill. Preserved as raw, none promoted.
Small tick marks similar to small DXF lines 1735-2007: filter by length < 200mm AND position inside wall thickness band.

algorithm_stress_test_targets.wall_extraction_time_s: ≤5 on this file (200-350 walls from 3443 lines)
algorithm_stress_test_targets.room_detection_time_s: ≤30 on this file (≥400 rooms from planar graph)
algorithm_stress_test_targets.memory_peak_mb: ≤500 (file is large but we use streaming)
